overview.title: Overview
overview.description: What this app does, where data lives, and how the main areas fit together.

gettingStarted.title: Getting started
gettingStarted.description: Sign-in, setup order (including tax and discounts), and trial behaviour.

units.title: Units
units.description: Stock units, unit types, standard conversions, and how invoices pick units.

products.title: Products & stock
products.description: Catalogue, stock moves, selling defaults, GST/HSN, conversions, export, print.

lenders.title: Lenders
lenders.description: Credit from lenders, settlements, balances, ledgers, and exports.

transactions.title: Transactions
transactions.description: Credit purchase, settlement, cash purchase, filters, and printing.

dailySales.title: Daily sales
dailySales.description: Invoice sales, misc sales, cash in hand, expenditure, and one row per date.

invoices.title: Invoices
invoices.description: Line items, settings-driven GST and discounts, PDFs, and how totals feed daily sales.

team.title: Team
team.description: Team members, roles (Owner, Admin, User), PINs, activation, and how this differs from Settings.

homeInsights.title: Home & insights
homeInsights.description: What appears on the Home dashboard: KPIs, charts, quick actions, sale detail, lenders, and low stock.

settingsData.title: Settings & data
settingsData.description: Business, tax, discounts, appearance, security, activity log, backups, and database path.

empty.title: No guide selected
empty.message: Pick a topic from the tabs above to view help.

emptyGuide.title: No guide content
emptyGuide.message: The help topics could not be loaded. Check that the app files are complete, then try again.

loadError.title: Could not load help
loadError.description: The guide module failed to load. Check the installation and try again.

developer.panelDescription: For product issues, purchase, renewal, or licensing, use the contact options below. WhatsApp is preferred for the quickest replies.
developer.whatsappHint: Prefer WhatsApp for issues, purchase, and renewal — replies are usually faster than phone calls.
